The Taxation (Provisional Charging) Act
(Laws, Volume 20 Cap 364)
The Taxation (Provisional Charging)
Order, 2009
WHEREAS it is proposed to introduce into the National Assembly
the Bills, the short titles of which are specified in the Schedule to
this Order, providing for the imposition or alteration oft axation;
AND Wll!!REAS the President has approved the Bills;
•.Now THEREFORE, in exercise of the powers contained in section
two,ofthe Taxation (Frovisional Charging)Act, the following Order
is hereby made:
l. This Order may be cited as the Taxation (Provisional Charging) Title
Order, 2009.
l. 2. Subject to the Taxation (Provisional Charging) Act, the ProvisionaJ
(" provisions oft he Bills, the short titles of which are specified in the enforcement
ofBills
Schedule to this Order shall, until the Bills becomes law, have the
force of the law as from 31st January, 2009. Cap. 364
